description: GET /content/entities/active/collections/{urn} must 400 on a non-collection URN; the exact phrasing is part of the lamb2 contract.

body_json.message: Invalid collection urn param, it must be a valid urn prefix of a collection or a third party id, instead: 'not-a-real-urn'

captured_from:
hand-authored from handler source (filter_by_urn.rs) - Rust line-continuation \
 collapses leading whitespace, so the message is single-spaced
